name: agent-forge
description: Coding Agent Manager - Manage Claude Code, Codex, and Kimi Code from a web dashboard

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.pm2:start: cd server && npx pm2 start pm2.config.js
scripts.pm2:stop: cd server && npx pm2 stop agent-forge
scripts.pm2:restart: cd server && npx pm2 restart agent-forge
scripts.pm2:logs: cd server && npx pm2 logs agent-forge
